item.name: Verdigris Guppy
item.description:
A fish prized not only for its green mottled beauty, but for the rarity of materials its body provides.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 1 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: This wavekin's mottled green pattern gives it the impression of being clad in weathered bronze─a perception not far from the truth. Its scales, suffused by the mineral waters of Bronze Lake, are known to contain traces of rare metal.
